summary: LR0 Truth Reset, LR1 pilot selection and LR2 Studio Foundation rescue are publicly verified and closed. Das Zimmer remains the selected pilot. LR3 minimal production loop rescue is the only active gate. The public Studio Foundation exists, but Control, Prompt Queue, Import, Review, QA, Lettering, Package and Restore are not yet one proven loop.

verifiedCapabilities: public Vite React TypeScript Studio Foundation route
responsive desktop and mobile Studio shell
safe browser and proxy director commands

productionFoundation.restoreRule: Restore every LR3 module atomically with source inventory, tests and a deterministic neutral EpisodePackage. Never merge the archive wholesale.

productArchitecture.target: One production app with a small truthful status view and a proven Studio-to-Restore loop.

canon.rule: The explicit human decision selects the pilot line. Dialogue, bibles, visuals, voices and final timing retain separate approval gates.

evidence.historicalSnapshotBoundary: The old closure covered a fixed selection through PR #30 and is not a live proof of the complete repository history.
evidence.priorityRule: Every new claim needs source, test, artifact or explicit not-applicable reason, run proof and visible review. Missing evidence stays open.

verifiedNow: LR0 Truth Reset is publicly closed.
LR1 is closed by the explicit human selection of Das Zimmer.
LR2 Studio Foundation rescue was merged through PR #59 on commit 18d0c34b81db781305941c0e9f34c308ac5c8b76.
LR2 PR CI run 29148650720 passed all truth, recovery, build, browser, timing and M1 checks.
GitHub Pages run 29148728164 passed artifact, deployment, public browser and screenshot hash verification.
The public Studio Foundation route is https://pagebabe.github.io/comic/studio/.
Desktop and mobile Studio screenshots have zero relevant horizontal overflow and contain no images.
The four-second M1 clip proves a technical media path only.
The reviewed recovery scope produced zero trustworthy visual character or location masters.
Character masters remain 0/4, location masters 0/4, approved voices 0/3 and finished episodes 0.
notAuthorizedAsFinal: every existing dialogue line in the selected pilot package
the four text merge bibles as final user-approved character canon
the eight-panel 45.5-second blueprint as immutable final timing
production readiness or a finished episode
stopRules: No Growth OS, social automation or new platform architecture.
No visual generation before the LR3 neutral production loop and LR4 selected-pilot fire test are proven.
No final, production-ready or complete claim without an external countercheck.
Only Pagebabe/comic may be modified for this recovery line.

nextSequence.title: Truth reset
nextSequence.doneWhen: Public dashboard, README, director and CI all show the same non-percentage truth state.

nextSequence.title: Pilot decision
nextSequence.doneWhen: One candidate is explicitly selected by the user and the other remains traceably archived.

nextSequence.title: Studio foundation rescue
nextSequence.doneWhen: The neutral Vite and React foundation is publicly restored under a tested Studio route without importing candidate material as automatically final canon.

nextSequence.title: Minimal production loop rescue
nextSequence.doneWhen: Control, Studio, Prompt Queue, Import, Review, QA, Lettering, Package and Restore process one neutral test EpisodePackage, including deterministic state deletion and restore.

nextSequence.title: Selected-pilot fire test
nextSequence.doneWhen: The selected Das Zimmer package completes import, review, QA, lettering, export, state deletion and successful restore without granting visual or voice approval.

nextSequence.title: Visual and audio locks
nextSequence.doneWhen: Character, set and voice references are visibly reviewed and approved.

nextSequence.title: First real pilot
nextSequence.doneWhen: A complete reviewed episode export exists.
